title: campanula scheuchzeri f. malyi
intro: Campanula scheuchzeri f. malyi, commonly known as the Alpine Bellflower, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include health benefits such as reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs. The therapeutic actions of Campanula scheuchzeri f. malyi include anti-inflammatory, expectorant, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents like phenolic acids, flavonoids, and terpenoids.
